blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,836 ft. Looking ahead, 13 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 7" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
